caption: A man with a beard, wearing a black jacket over a grey shirt, is interviewed outdoors in a park-like setting with trees and greenery in the background. He speaks into a microphone featuring the "ANI" logo. The scene is presented as a news broadcast with various graphics. A red banner at the top reads "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'" and a yellow bar mentions "तेजस्वी यादव, पूर्व डिप्टी CM, बिहार". Small inset portraits of men appear on the sides, labeled with titles like "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार", "मंत्री विजेंद्र यादव", and "श्रवण कुमार". A red banner at the bottom changes across the frames, first stating "बिहार के डिप्टी CM बने सन्न्राट चौधरी" and later "JDU कोटे से मंत्री बने विजय चौधरी". Another overlay asks "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?". The time "10:03 PM" is displayed in the bottom right. The man remains the central focus, speaking throughout the sequence.
